creator: mforde@rainysoul.net
text:
I believe I have encountered a similar problem with the i386 build of
FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE on the A8N32-SLI deluxe when using SATA disks.

The boot loader is found and prompts me to press F1 for FreeBSD or F5
for Drive 1. 

After Pressing F1, I see a '-' quickly replaced by '/' and then the boot
loader stops. There is no further disk activity and the system never
loads. 

I reverted back to FreeBSD 6.4 on an IDE disk. Under this build, the
secondary (SATA) disk is recognized.  

Please let me know if there are any steps I can take to provide you with
more helpful information than this "it don't work" meesage.

-- 
  M. Forde
